zh.Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Wales: 威爾士卡迪甘史爾易斯古波--可德
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn是Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion和Margaret ferch Robert的兒子，於1302年8月14日出生在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾。他於大約1327年與Eleanor Goch在威爾士卡迪甘史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年8月14日在威爾士卡迪甘史爾易斯古波--可德享年41歲。

zh-hans.Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Wales: 威尔士卡迪甘史爾易斯古波--可德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn是Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion和Margaret ferch Robert的儿子，于1302年8月14日出生在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾。他于大约1327年与Eleanor Goch在威尔士卡迪甘史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年8月14日在威尔士卡迪甘史爾易斯古波--可德享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn was born on 14 August 1302, in Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion and Margaret ferch Robert. He married Eleanor Goch about 1327, in Cardiganshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 14 August 1343, in Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Wales, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn est né le 14 août 1302, à Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion et Margaret ferch Robert. Il a épousé Eleanor Goch environ 1327, à Cardiganshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1343, à Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Galles, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.of,Is Coed,Cardiganshire,Wales: Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn wurde am 14. August 1302 in Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion und Margaret ferch Robert geboren. Er hat um 1327 in Cardiganshire, Wales Eleanor Goch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. August 1343 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn è nato il il 14 agosto 1302 nel Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion e Margaret ferch Robert. Lui sposato Eleanor Goch circa 1327, nel Cardiganshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1343, nel Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Galles, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelynは1302年8月14日にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアでLlywellyn ab Owain Lord of South CeredigionとMargaret ferch Robertの息子として生まれた。約1327年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアでEleanor Gochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年8月14日にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアイスグボル-イ-コエドで41歳で死去した。

ko.of,Is Coed,Cardiganshire,Wales: 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 리스 와이 코드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn(은)는 1302년 8월 14일 영국 웨일스 카디건실르에서 Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion(와)과 Margaret ferch Robert의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1327년 웨일스 카디건실르에서 Eleanor Goch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 8월 14일 웨일스 카디건실르 이스구볼-이-코드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.14 August 1302–14 August 1343: 14 de agosto de 1302–14 de agosto de 1343
pt.of,Is Coed,Cardiganshire,Wales: Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn nasceu em 14 de agosto de 1302, em Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion e Margaret ferch Robert. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Goch aproximadamente 1327, em Cardiganshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1343, em Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Gales, com 41 anos.

ru.of,Is Coed,Cardiganshire,Wales: ллиз и коед, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn родился 14 августа 1302 г. в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Llywellyn ab Owain Lord of South Ceredigion и Margaret ferch Robert. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Goch около 1327 г. в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 августа 1343 г. в местности исгубор-и-коед, кардиганьшир, Уэльс в возрасте 41 год.

Se casó con Eleanor Goch aproximadamente 1327, en Cardiganshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1343, en Ysgubor-y-coed, Cardiganshire, Gales, a la edad de 41 años.
